title: Kenyan-Style Pork Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful stew inspired by Kenyan cuisine, made with tender pork and crispy spices.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Brown the pork cubes until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Remove the pork from the pot and set aside.
Add the chopped onion and minced garlic to the pot and cook until the onion is translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the chopped crispy onions, stew spice blend, and tomato paste to the pot and cook for 1 minute.
Add the browned pork, chicken broth, and water to the pot.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then cover the pot and transfer to the oven.
Bake at 300°F for 2 1/2 hours, or until the pork is tender.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with additional crispy onions if desired.
